body.title: Fix granny bus dispatch tests: setstatus assertions use wrong mock
body.result: added _mock_setstatus_factory(); 6 tests updated to patch _setstatus_direct; all 27 pass
body.intention: I intend that the 6 setstatus assertions in test_granny_bus_dispatch.py match the actual psycopg2-based _setstatus_direct implementation.
body.description:
6 tests in tests/test_granny_bus_dispatch.py assert that subprocess.run is called with 'setstatus' — but _setstatus_direct uses psycopg2 directly, not subprocess. Tests were written before _setstatus_direct replaced the subprocess path. Pre-existing; confirmed by stash-and-run.

Failing tests:
- TestDispatchBus::test_sets_status_dispatched
- TestProcessHandshakeReplies::test_ack_reply_sets_acked
- TestProcessHandshakeReplies::test_started_reply_sets_in_progress
- TestProcessHandshakeReplies::test_timeout_reply_sets_escalated
- TestRunOnceBusDispatch::test_dispatch_sends_envelope_and_sets_dispatched
- TestRunOnceBusDispatch::test_ack_reply_transitions_to_acked

**Affected files:** tests/test_granny_bus_dispatch.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: update the 6 setstatus assertions to patch _setstatus_direct and verify via return value or call args. OUT: changing daemon.py production code.
**Completion criteria:** All 6 tests pass. No new failures introduced.
